description_long: This is a light, single-rotor civilian helicopter with a streamlined fuselage and a tail boom extending to a small tail rotor. The main body is painted in a muted, matte grayish-green color, with a smooth, aerodynamic profile and a rounded nose. The helicopter features two large, rectangular cockpit doors on each side, and the cockpit windows are wide, slightly curved, and wrap around the front for maximum visibility. The landing gear consists of two parallel metal skids connected by crossbars, providing stable ground support. The main rotor has two long, slender blades, and the tail rotor is mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom. No visible registration numbers or markings are present on the exterior.
description: A light, grayish-green civilian helicopter with a single main rotor, tail rotor, and metal landing skids. It features large cockpit windows and a streamlined body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow nose, cockpit windows, and the alignment of the main rotor blades.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the fuselage, cockpit doors, landing skids, and the main and tail rotors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, tail rotor, and the symmetry of the landing skids.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the fuselage, cockpit doors, and rotor configuration.
attribute_rotor_blades: Two long, narrow, black main rotor blades made of composite material, each extending nearly the full width of the helicopter; no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: A small, two-bladed tail rotor mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, colored black with no visible markings or protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Two straight, tubular metal landing skids painted gray, connected by two crossbars for stability, with simple footpads at each end.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Three large, slightly curved cockpit windows at the front and sides, clear with a slight tint, framed by thin metal supports.
